---
format: html
---


![Neon - Ireland - Shot on Nikon D40](Images/DSC_0723.JPG)

![Cappuccino Flower (not its real name) - Ireland - Shot on Nikon D40](Images/DSC_1228.JPG)

![Eyes on the sky - Minnesota - Shot on Nikon Z7II ](Images/IMG_0407.JPG)

![Big Horned Sheep - Banff National Park CA - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_1208.JPEG) 

![Biking - Banff - Jen Celotta - Shot on Nikon Z7II ](Images/TC1_1813.JPEG)

![Squirrel - Banff - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_1825.JPEG)

![Clark’s Nutcracker - Banff, Alberta CA - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_2188.JPG)

![Restaurant - Paris, France - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_27662.JPEG) 

![Statue - Paris, France - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_5019.JPG)

![Fire - Lincoln City, Oregon - Ben Iannini - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_6210.JPEG) 

![BMW 535i - Portland, Oregon - Shot on Nikon Z7II](Images/TC1_6745.JPEG)

![Cape Falcon - Tillamook, Oregon - Shot on Nikon Z7II ](Images/TC1_6826.JPEG)

![Beach - Tillamook, Oregon - Shot on Nikon Z7II ](Images/TC1_6925.JPEG)

![Ten Falls - Portland, OR - Shot Nikon Z7II ](Images/TC1_7842.JPG)
